ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, AI, admin) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level or rank of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game was played */,
  "game_length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in moves */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., B+0.5, W+50.5) */,
  "num_passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made during the game */,
  "is_resign_disabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if resignation is disabled */,
  "is_marked_for_resign" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game is marked for resignation */,
  "is_could_won" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game could have been won */,
  "marked_resign_player" TEXT /* Player who marked the game for resignation */,
  "resign_threshold" INTEGER /* Resignation threshold set for the game */,
  "time_per_game" REAL /* Average time per game in seconds */,
  "training_steps" INTEGER /* Number of training steps taken for the AI in the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., online, offline, tournament) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., casual, ranked) */,
  "komi" REAL /* Komi value used in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game setting */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game these settings apply to */,
  "is_resign_disabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if resignation is disabled for the game */,
  "resign_threshold" INTEGER /* Resignation threshold set for the game */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Type of time control used in the game */,
  "main_time" INTEGER /* Main time in seconds */,
  "byoyomi_time" INTEGER /* Byoyomi time in seconds */,
  "byoyomi_stones" INTEGER /* Number of byoyomi stones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_settings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the training is based on */,
  "training_steps" INTEGER /* Number of training steps taken */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the AI algorithm used */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training occurred */,
  "evaluation_metric" REAL /* Evaluation metric used to evaluate the AI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the move is part of */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Number of the move in the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the move */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position on the board where the move was made */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of move (e.g., normal, pass, resign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_moves_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_moves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user these statistics apply to */,
  "win_loss_ratio" REAL /* Win/loss ratio of the player */,
  "avg_game_length" REAL /* Average game length for the player */,
  "avg_num_passes" REAL /* Average number of passes made by the player */,
  "elo_rating" REAL /* Elo rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_tags_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baduk_board" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board state */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the board state is part of */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Number of the move in the game */,
  "board_state" TEXT /* State of the board, including stones and liberties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baduk_board_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user these metrics apply to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game these metrics are for */,
  "win_loss_ratio" REAL /* Win/loss ratio of the player in the game */,
  "avg_num_passes" REAL /* Average number of passes made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)
